sidebar.wechat_hint: Local bot + Tencent's official ClawBot — pipe WeChat into EchoMind
sidebar.cloud_hint: Multi-device sync via VPS + optional shared LLM calls

home.no_chats_hint: Pick a note from the main list and click "Chat" to start
home.clusters_empty: Record more notes to surface topic clusters
home.review_empty: Once you've captured a few notes, the forgotten gems will surface here.

thought.append_placeholder_root: Append to this note… (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send)

appearance.compact_desc: Reduce spacing and font size for higher info density.

llm.base_url_hint: DeepSeek is auto-filled. Other providers usually leave this blank.

test.verify_desc: Save and test the current config.

bridge_stale.title: Cloud bridge is still using the old LLM config
bridge_stale.desc_a: Local LLM config has been updated, but "Route LLM via cloud bridge" is on — WeChat
bridge_stale.desc_b: and other bridge-routed calls still use the key/model previously pushed to the VPS.

embedding.local_info: Local mode uses the bundled BGE-small-zh-v1.5 model (the first launch downloads ~90MB of ONNX files), then runs fully offline. After saving, we recommend running "Data → Rebuild vector index" once.
embedding.api_key_placeholder: Leave blank to share the LLM API key

websearch.intro: The "Related resources" panel currently relies on LLM memory to recommend URLs, often producing 404s. After configuring a search API, the backend runs a real web search first, then lets the model pick from accessible candidates, eliminating 404s. Leave blank = original LLM path (compatibility).
websearch.key_hint_b: to sign up → copy the API key from Dashboard.

ai.auto_tag_desc: Let AI generate domain and tags for new ideas.
ai.semantic_desc: Recommend related entries for similar ideas.
ai.auto_analyze_desc: Automatically call AI to generate context after a new idea is saved.

data.export_desc: Export all ideas, conversations and settings as a JSON file.
data.import_desc: Restore from a previously exported file.
data.rebuild_desc: Re-embed all ideas to restore semantic search. May take a while.
data.wipe_desc: Permanently delete all ideas, conversations and embedding vectors.

about.description: A local-first AI inspiration companion that helps you record, enrich and explore every idea. Built with Tauri, React and Rust.
about.check_updates_desc: Auto-checks at startup; click here to check now.

skills_tab.empty_hint: Create one, or drop a .md file into the skills directory
skills_tab.scan_no_new: No new skills found (all already imported)
skills_tab.delete_confirm_a: Are you sure you want to delete

chat_hub.synthesize_title: Let AI turn this conversation into a deliverable plan document
chat_hub.initial_prompt: Please start probing this idea — help me think it through.
chat_hub.resources_analyzing: AI is analyzing and recommending resources...
chat_hub.withdraw_message: After withdrawing, this message and the subsequent AI replies will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
chat_hub.picker_heading: Pick an idea to start chatting
chat_hub.picker_subhead: Pick an existing chat from the sidebar, or pick an idea below to dive deeper.
chat_hub.picker_empty: No ideas yet — go capture one from the home page

search.reindex_title: Reindex all ideas (use after embedding logic changes)
search.no_results_hint: Try different keywords, or capture more ideas
search.initial_hint: Type a description and hit Enter — AI will surface semantically related content

archive.confirm_restore_message: Restore this idea? It will reappear in the main list.
archive.confirm_delete_message: Permanently delete "{{preview}}…"? This cannot be undone.

capture.label: Quick capture
capture.shortcut_hint: Enter to save · Esc to close

drawer.archive_confirm_message: After archiving, this idea will be removed from the main list — you can find and restore it from the archive page.
